Off Calendar May-23-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. CHRISTIAN GREEN, Esq. of Wilson, Elser, Moskotiwtz Edelman & Dicker LLP (Tel: 415-433-0990) for defendants Postmates, LLC and Postmates, Inc.;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANTS POSTMATES INC., and POSTMATES, LLC's Motion For Order To Compel Compliance With Subpoenas For Production Of Documents From Non-Party Medical Providers.

Defendants stipulate to the matter being decided by the pro tem judge. The pro tem judge and counsel for defendants (both appearing remotely) authorize the clerk to sign the formal stipulation form on their behalf.

Matter discussed.

The Court rules as follows: Defendant's motion is granted as unopposed.

The Court instructs the moving party to submit a proposed order in Word format to JPDeol@dhillonlaw.com.

Judge Pro Tem: John-Paul Deol; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)
